majorFunctions.title: 1. Early Procurement and Utilization of Budget

successIndicators.description: Submitted PPMP as required on or before February 15 for FY 2027 Budget Proposal for GAA with complete documentary requirements to Budget Unit with only 1 revision
successIndicators.measures: Complete PPMP forms with specs and cost estimates

successIndicators.description: Submitted PPMP as required on or before June 30 for FY 2027 Budget Proposal for Income Fund with complete documentary requirements to Budget Unit with only 1 revision
successIndicators.measures: Complete PPMP forms with specs and cost estimates

successIndicators.description: Submitted PPMP as required on or before August 31 for FY 2028 Budget Proposal for GAA with complete documentary requirements to Budget Unit with only 1 revision
successIndicators.measures: Complete PPMP forms with specs and cost estimates

successIndicators.description: Submitted Purchase Requests (PR) and relevant documents on or before February 20, May 15, and August 14, 2026 with complete documentary requirements to Procurement Unit
successIndicators.measures: 3 PRs submitted on time with complete attachments

successIndicators.description: Submitted Purchase Requests on or before September 15 for FY 2027 Early Procurement Activities (EPA) to Procurement Unit with complete documentary requirements
100% submission of liquidation reports 15 days (local) or 30 days (international) upon return to OS to the Accounting Unit with complete documentary requirements
Submitted activity proposal to immediate supervisor 4 months before the conduct of activity
successIndicators.measures: Activity proposals submitted 4 months in advance

majorFunctions.title: 2. Quality Assurance and Excellence Program (ISO, ISA, PQA, Accreditation, QS, SUC Levelling, Universityhood)

successIndicators.description: Ensured submission of QO 5 working days after the OPCR review of targets or as scheduled to CQA with only 1 revision
Ensured 100% submission of QO Performance Monitoring Graph on or before 12th day of the ensuing month to CQA with only 1 revision
successIndicators.measures: Graph submitted on or before 12th day of month

successIndicators.description: Ensured 100% submission of final revised Work Instruction and/or FMEA within 10 working days to CQA after review or as scheduled

successIndicators.description: 100% submission of updated accreditation PPP/IP/Self-survey within 5 working days upon receipt of request as required by CQA

successIndicators.description: Ensured 100% submission of compliance report to the previous QA recommendations within 5 working days upon receipt of request as required by CQA

successIndicators.description: Ensured 100% release of accurate QA documents within 5 working days upon receipt of request

successIndicators.description: Ensured 100% submission of monthly NCARs for unmet targets to CQA on or before the 12th day of the ensuing month

majorFunctions.title: 7. Physical Plant and Facilities Development Projects
